offer: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual processing causes late orders. We convert paper work orders into digital invoices instead of manual data entry into accounting software.
problem: Manual processing of paper work orders leads to delays in invoicing.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Share in community forums for construction tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for initial setup and template for invoice generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
